name: superhuman-agent
description: Superhuman Agent for Callour Studio — one plugin, five live senior specialists: Product, Design, Graphic, Dev, and Research. Connects Codex to the Superhuman Operations MCP; start-task reads and claims a task, brings in the right specialist, and conducts the work to create-report.

interface.shortDescription: Senior specialist agents for your Superhuman tasks.
interface.longDescription: Superhuman Agent is an umbrella of senior specialists that work your Superhuman Operations tasks. Live today: Product (problem framing, PRDs, prioritisation), Design (IA, flows, wireframes, visual design, Figma, design QA), Graphic (brand and marketing systems), Dev (implementation, tests, review), and Research (UX and market research). One entry, start-task, reads and claims a task, picks the right specialist, and runs the work; create-report documents the process and outcome back to the task. Operational surface only — no finance, sales, or people money. Requires a SUPERHUMAN_MCP_TOKEN env var (ask the founder for a token).
defaultPrompt: Start task <paste a task link> and walk me through it.
What does this task need — which specialist, and what's the plan?
Run the full process on this task.
